violations.text: Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and basement dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, prep unit, table beneath flattop grill, and low shelf unit beside prep unit have an accumulation of soil residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
One light beneath the hood was burned out. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The floors along the walls have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands properly between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher, rinsing hands with spray hose at the dishwasher, not using handsink. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the table beneath the grill, and the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of leaves and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The floor around the grease trap at the 3 bay sink has an accumulation of brown grease trap discharge. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The walk in freezer has an accumulation of frost and ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings (cell phone and keys) were observed stored on the shelf in the cooking area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Raw animal foods (such as liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cut deli vegetables) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Steamer observed leaking. Equipment to maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. sides of ice machine 2. exterior and interior of dish machine 3. walls by 3 bay and mop sinks New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
